meta.description: Linux Log Guardian — 土耳其开源 nginx WAF。log → ban 约 15 分钟。
hero.title: Linux Log Guardian
hero.tag: nginx access log → WAF/CRS → 内核封禁 · 单链 · self-hosted
about.title: 关于 — Linux Log Guardian
site.purpose: 这是公开的落地与下载页。 静态内容：概览、安装指南、证据包与联系。Log Guardian 不在此运行 — 请安装到您自己的 Linux 服务器。
about.body:
Linux Log Guardian 是土耳其开发的 开源 (MIT) self-hosted 安全栈。一条链：读 nginx 日志 → OWASP CRS 规则 → 内核级封禁。

独立社区项目 — 代码审查、定制与本地托管，无云锁定。

  • 源码透明；欢迎社区贡献
  • 二进制：log-guardian · 包：log-guardian_*.deb
  • Core 单独即可生产 (~15 分钟)
  • Dashboard、Grafana、fleet = 可选 Pro 层
flow.title: 单链：从日志到内核封禁
flow.note: XDR、Wasm 市场与 LLM Copilot 为长期可选层 — Core 单独即可生产。
scope.honest.title: Honest limits (not competing on edge speed)
scope.honest.body:
• Reactive architecture — first request may pass until the log line is parsed; we are not inline ModSec throughput.
  • No L3/L4 DDoS absorb — use CDN/Cloudflare on top.
  • Distributed botnets — per-IP ban; no CrowdSec signal network.
  • We do: log → CRS/WAF → ~17 ms kernel ban, proof PDF, Telegram ops, MIT self-hosted.
install.title: 安装指南（详细）
install.intro: 在 Ubuntu/Debian 上生产环境分步安装。笔记本或 VirtualBox VM 可无 XDP 运行。完整文档：docs/QUICKSTART_NGINX.md 与 docs/LAPTOP_OPS.md。
install.deb_body:
No compile step. The package ships binaries, systemd units, rules, scripts and rules.conf.template. Upgrade-safe: an existing /etc/log-guardian/rules.conf (API token, settings) is not overwritten.

Download from GitHub Releases or build on a dev machine with bash scripts/build_deb.sh → dist/log-guardian_*.deb.
install.deb_s1_body: Install Debian package dependencies on first setup. nginx can be added in the same command if missing.
install.block_deb_deps:
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install -y ipset libbpf1 libcurl4 libpcre2-8-0 libsqlite3-0 \
  libssl3 libelf1 libz1 liburing2 nginx
install.out_deb_deps:
Reading package lists... Done
Setting up ipset (7.x) ...
Setting up libbpf1:amd64 ...
Setting up nginx (1.x) ...
install.deb_s2_body: If dpkg -i reports missing dependencies, run apt-get install -f. postinst creates the log-guardian user, permissions and services automatically.
install.block_deb:
# Copy .deb to server (scp, wget, USB...)
sudo dpkg -i log-guardian_*_amd64.deb
sudo apt-get install -f   # if dependencies missing

# On success:
#   log-guardian kuruldu.
#   sudo bash .../install_first_run.sh
#   bash .../post_install_verify.sh
install.out_deb:
Selecting previously unselected package log-guardian.
(Reading database ... 100%)
Setting up log-guardian (72e5a7b) ...
[deb_post_install] rules.conf olusturuldu: /etc/log-guardian/rules.conf

log-guardian kuruldu.
install.deb_s3_body: Prepares nginx log format, FP trust and API security in one pass. Scripts live under /usr/local/share/log-guardian/scripts/.
install.out_deb_first:
[OK] log-guardian.service active
[OK] log-guardian-daemon.service active
[OK] --health IPC
[OK] API fail-closed (tokensiz 403)

=== ozet ===
  FAIL: 0   WARN: 0
[OK] post_install_verify — kurulum kapisi gecti
install.src_body: Clone the repo and build locally. Best for development and customization.
install.req_body:
• Ubuntu 22.04 / 24.04 或 Debian 12 (amd64)
  • nginx 可写 access log
  • root/sudo (systemd, ipset, /etc/log-guardian)
  • 可选 Pro：Docker (dashboard/Grafana)、适合 eBPF 的内核
install.s1_body: 克隆、编译并运行主安装脚本。install.sh 配置 systemd、规则与 nginx 日志格式。
install.block1:
git clone <repo> log-guardian && cd log-guardian
make -j$(nproc)
sudo bash install.sh
install.s2_title: 首次运行与 API 安全
install.s2_body: 启动服务并为 dashboard 准备 API token 同步。
install.block_api:
sudo bash scripts/install_first_run.sh
sudo bash scripts/ensure_api_security.sh
bash scripts/sync_dashboard_api_token.sh
install.s3_body: WAF 需要 log_guardian 格式读取 body 与 XFF。安装器通常会自动应用 — 请验证：
install.block_nginx:
# examples/nginx-log-guardian.conf → site config
STRICT=1 bash scripts/check_nginx_log_format.sh
sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx
install.s4_body: 检查健康、告警与 Prometheus 指标。笔记本上 post_install_verify.sh 可汇总。
install.block_verify:
sudo log-guardian --health
sudo log-guardian --status
# Source install:
bash scripts/post_install_verify.sh
# .deb install:
bash /usr/local/share/log-guardian/scripts/post_install_verify.sh
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9091/metrics | head
install.out_health:
[HEALTH] daemon IPC: OK
[HEALTH] BPF xdp=OFF execve=OFF lineage=OFF
[HEALTH] RCE det=0 kill=0 lineage=0 connect=0 uptime=…s
install.out_verify:
[OK] log-guardian.service active
[OK] metrics :9091
[OK] API fail-closed (tokensiz 403)
[OK] nginx log_guardian format

=== ozet ===
  FAIL: 0   WARN: 0
[OK] post_install_verify — kurulum kapisi gecti
install.s5_title: VirtualBox / 无 XDP（笔记本与 VM）
install.s5_body: 无 eBPF/XDP 时使用 --no-xdp 与 ipset 封禁。服务失败则运行修复脚本。
install.block2:
sudo bash install.sh --no-xdp
sudo bash scripts/install_first_run.sh
# if service FAIL:
sudo bash scripts/repair_no_xdp_stack.sh
install.tip: 提示： JWT：bash scripts/laptop_jwt_setup.sh。快速 demo：SKIP_WEBHOOK=1 bash scripts/demo_3min.sh
dashboard.title: Dashboard — 安装后（可选 Pro）
dashboard.where: 重要： dashboard 不在此营销站运行。localhost:3001 在您安装的那台 Linux 机器上 — 访客的 localhost 不是您的服务器。
dashboard.body: Pro dashboard (Next.js)：fleet 状态、封禁历史、测试与证据 PDF。在已安装主机 :3001 TLS 监听。上网前请用 laptop_harden.sh 加固。
dashboard.access_row1: 阅读本页、下载源码或 .deb — 不会打开 3001 端口。
dashboard.access_row2: 在 Ubuntu/Debian 上 install.sh + dashboard_dev.sh 后，同一机器打开 http://localhost:3001。
dashboard.access_row3: SSH 隧道或（防火墙允许时）https://SERVER_IP:3001。勿用 demo 密码暴露公网。
dashboard.req_body:
• Core 只需 nginx + sudo — dashboard 非必需
  • Dashboard 需 Docker + dashboard_dev.sh
  • Grafana 另需 grafana_stack.sh（可选）
dashboard.start:
# On the machine where you installed (not this website):
bash scripts/dashboard_dev.sh
# Browser on the same machine:
#   http://localhost:3001
# Login: admin / DASHBOARD_ADMIN_PASSWORD in .env
dashboard.features:
• Fleet： agent 在线/离线、近期告警
  • Tests： phase100, competitive-proof, bench
  • Reports： PDF/JSON 证据包
  • Grafana： tenant 指标 via bash scripts/grafana_provision.sh
dashboard.optional: Core 够吗？ 够。只要 log → WAF → 内核封禁可跳过 dashboard。CLI (log-guardian --status) 与 Prometheus (:9091/metrics) 随 Core 提供。
dashboard.preview_note: 下方截图为示例。 live UI 仅在您的安装上运行。
dashboard.note: 总结：本网站 = 下载与学习。Dashboard = 您的服务器上、安装后、可选。
warn.title: ⚠️ 暴露到公网前
warn.p1: 笔记本/demo：密码 DegistirBeni!123 故意开放。
warn.p2: 公网 VPS：sudo env LG_NEW_PASSWORD='…' bash scripts/laptop_harden.sh
layers.title: 层级
layers.core_desc: log → WAF → ipset 封禁 (~15 分钟)
layers.note: Pro 与可选层为扩展；日常使用 Core 足够。
download.title: 下载 (.deb 包)
evidence.title: 证据包
tests.title: Validation tests
tests.page_intro: Same matrix as dashboard /tests — install gates, CRS parity, FP, ban latency, corpus recall and 72h soak. Each card is automated script output.
tests.teaser: Same automated test matrix as the dashboard — 28 proofs (install gates, CRS, FP, ban latency, corpus, 72h soak).
tests.intro: Same automated test matrix as the dashboard — install gates (FAIL=0), CRS parity, FP, ban latency, corpus recall and 72h VPS/VM soak. Live installs refresh the same data at dashboard /tests.
tests.note: Raw JSON: competitive-proof.json · PDF: competitive-proof.pdf · Refresh: bash scripts/competitive_proof.sh
laptop.title: 笔记本验证矩阵
laptop.intro: 快速 dev gate：sprint gate、1h soak 与 3 min demo。VM 72h soak：laptop_soak_72h.sh --start。
laptop.block:
SKIP_PHASE100=1 bash scripts/laptop_sprint_gate.sh
SOAK_1H=1 bash scripts/laptop_soak_72h.sh --start
SKIP_WEBHOOK=1 bash scripts/demo_3min.sh
